title: Implement AWS Backup plan coverage for Amplify Gen2 DynamoDB tables
description: Create and implement remediation branch/work for Prowler finding requiring DynamoDB tables to be governed by an AWS Backup plan in Amplify Gen2.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started implementation: adding AWS Backup plan + selection for all Amplify Gen2 DynamoDB data tables in dashboard/amplify/backend.ts, then validating via Amplify TypeScript compile.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented AWS Backup remediation in dashboard/amplify/backend.ts: added DynamoDbBackupStack with BackupVault + BackupPlan, daily scheduled backup rule, 35-day retention, and selection over all backend.data.resources.tables via BackupResource.fromDynamoDbTable. Also normalized environment names for resource naming safety. Validation passed: npx tsc -p amplify/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Committed remediation code for AWS Backup plan coverage on Amplify Gen2 DynamoDB tables with semantic-release style commit message. Next: push branch and open PR targeting staging for validation.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Pushed branch and opened staging validation PR: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/131. Commit: 44944131 (feat(amplify): add AWS Backup plan for Gen2 DynamoDB tables).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: AWS Backup plan for Amplify Gen2 DynamoDB tables implemented and merged in PR #131 (March 18).
